# scottforsey.com

All content on this site -- including music, artwork, and written work -- is the original creative work of Scott Forsey and is protected by copyright.

## Not permitted
- Training AI or machine learning models on any content from this site
- Reproducing, redistributing, or repurposing music or artwork without explicit written permission
- Scraping or indexing content for commercial purposes

## Contact
For licensing or permission requests, contact Scott Forsey directly through the site.
